selection_summary.selection_strategy: Manual long-dialog audit subset. Reuses the known import and multi-page-dialog boundary cases, adds nearby long assistant flows with explicit end states, and keeps three stable non-step controls to detect spillover.
restpattern_hypotheses: long assistant flows fail mainly when the answer escalates before the documented procedure
chunk boundaries can hide the true completion step and create a pseudo-failure
when the full procedure is present, clean long-dialog completions should stay green

selection_notes.jaws_de_teacher_wave_v1::eval::step_by_s: Long branchy procedure with neighboring edit/delete paths and a clean final OK state.
selection_notes.jaws_de_teacher_wave_v1::train::step_by_: Multi-tab settings dialog with a long setup sequence before the actual element-type edits.
Another long settings-center path with several structure and attribute steps before completion.
Graphic-labeling flow that combines HJPad setup, JAWS Manager navigation, and a late end state.
Braille-math configuration flow with prerequisite setup and a final mode toggle.
Stable import-completion anchor with warning confirmation and a visible result dialog.
Long rule-management path that exercises deactivate/reactivate and bulk-disable branches.
Documented multi-page dialog case that previously escalated instead of following the full procedure.
First half of the SBAK import assistant; useful only together with its sibling completion chunk.
Second half of the same import assistant, including merge-vs-keep conflict handling and true finish.
